title: Emu/Tern CC battery - CC battery level less than 30%, yellow icon
scenario: Charging case battery icon on Home screen does not turn yellow when battery level drops below 30%
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device (with a charging case) is paired and connected.
Navigate to the Home screen of the app.
Check the charging case battery level displayed on the Home screen.
If the charging case battery level is above 30%, discharge the case until the battery level drops below 30%.
Observe the color of the charging case battery icon on the Home screen.
expected: When the charging case battery level is less than 30%, the battery icon on the Home screen should display as yellow.
